zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Howard於大約1445年出生時，她的父親John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk24歲，母親Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk24歲。她於大約1466年與Sir John Wyndham在英國諾福爾可可洛東普結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1484年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可費爾布利格享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾波斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Howard于大约1445年出生时，她的父亲John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk24岁，母亲Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk24岁。她于大约1466年与Sir John Wyndham在英国諾福爾可可洛東普结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1484年在英国英格兰諾福爾可費爾布利格享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾波斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Howard was born about 1445, her father, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, was 24 and her mother, Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk, was 24. She married Sir John Wyndham about 1466, in Crownthorpe, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1484, in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Howard est née environ 1445, son père, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Wyndham environ 1466, à Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1484, à Felbrigg, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Howard um 1445 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk 24 und ihre Mutter Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk 24. Sie hat um 1466 in Crownthorpe, Norfolk, England Sir John Wyndham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1484 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Felbrigg, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Howard è nata il circa 1445, sua padre, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Wyndham circa 1466, nel Crownthorpe, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1484, nel Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Boston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Howardが約1445年に生まれた時，父John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolkは24歳，母Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolkは24歳であった。約1466年にイギリスノーフォルククロウンソルペでSir John Wyndhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1484年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクフエルブリググで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Howard(이)가 대략 1445년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1466년 영국 노르폴크 크로운소에서 Sir John Wyndham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1484년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 프브리그에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 보스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Howard nasceu aproximadamente 1445, seu pai, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Wyndham aproximadamente 1466, em Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1484, em Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Howard родилась около 1445 г., её отцу по имени John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Wyndham около 1466 г. в местности кроунтаурп, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1484 г. в местности фелбриг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Howard nació aproximadamente 1445, su papá, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Catherine Moleyns Duchess of Norfolk, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir John Wyndham aproximadamente 1466, en Crownthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1484, en Felbrigg, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
